name: PromptRoot Relay
description: Connects Brace to relay.promptroot.io so PromptRoot users can trigger 'Run in Brace' without a Cloudflare Tunnel. Requires PROMPTROOT_AGENT_TOKEN env var (SDD-0002 Phase 3b).

relayUrl.description: Override the relay WebSocket URL. Default: wss://relay.promptroot.io/connect

runTimeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for agent to complete a relay job (ms). Default: 300000 (5m).
